messages.message: Static method OwnPay\Http\Response::json() invoked with 3 parameters, 1-2 required.
Method OwnPay\Http\Request::query() invoked with 0 parameters, 1-2 required.
Call to function is_array() with array will always evaluate to true.
Using nullsafe property access "?->name" on left side of ?? is unnecessary. Use -> instead.
Using nullsafe property access "?->icon" on left side of ?? is unnecessary. Use -> instead.
Property OwnPay\Service\Payment\GatewayApiService::$configs is never read, only written.
